dataSource.note: Community-sourced (APK bundles encrypted; see tools/extract/ENCRYPTION-FINDINGS.md). Held-item values at max level 30. Percentages stored as decimals.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and lowering their Defense by 15% for 2s when it hits. If this boosted attack hits only a single target, it deals increased damage.

moves.name: Feint
moves.description: Dash in an arc, attacking enemies that come in contact with Absol. This move ignores the defense stat and shield effects of enemies.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Slash with sharp claws in front of the user, increasing this move's critical-hit rate.

moves.name: Midnight Slash
moves.description: Unleashes a flurry of slashes in front of the user. This move ends by unleashing powerful blades of energy, dealing increased damage to enemies and shoves them.

passiveAbility.name: Super Luck
passiveAbility.description: Increased Critical-Hit rate by 15%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Slash at enemies in front of Aegislash, dealing damage to them. If the boost count is one or more, basic attacks become a boosted attack. When in Blade Stance: pierce through enemies, dealing damage. When in Shield Stance: ram enemies, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act for a short time, restore HP, and reduce the cooldown of Sacred Sword and Shadow Claw when this attack hits. Every boosted attack consumes one boost count. Up to 4 boosted boosted attacks can be stored.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description: Cast a shadow in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. After the shadow hits an enemy or travels its maximum distance, Aegislash warps to the shadow’s location, dealing damage to nearby enemies and increase boost count by 1.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.description: Envelops Aegislash in a powerful protective force for 1s. The protection disappears after blocking one attack or after 1s and then increases boost count by 1.

moves.name: Coup de Grace
moves.description: Unleash a ground-splitting slash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The lower their remaining HP, the more damage this move deals. If this slash knocks out an enemy, boost count increases by 1.

passiveAbility.name: No Guard
passiveAbility.description: Honedge and Doublade do not gain the stat benefits of Stance Change. However, their boosted attack functions like Aegislash's Sword Stance boosted attack.

moves.name: Attack - Charcadet
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage to enemies within a cone area of effect in front of this Pokémon.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Charge forward, dealing damage to any enemy hit and leave them unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Bubble
moves.description: Spray bubbles in a cone; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. This move can be used while moving.

moves.name: Belly Bash
moves.description: Azumarill pounds their belly 3 times, granting a shield. With each pound, Azumarill loses HP in exchange for increased Attack. Azumarill can move while pounding their belly. Afterward, target an enemy and then charge at the target; dealing damage to them and throwing all enemies hit while charging.

passiveAbility.name: Huge Power
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon hits only a single enemy with a basic attack, a move, or their Unite Move, the hit is always a critical hit. However, when hitting two or more enemies at once with a basic attack, a move, or its Unite Move, the hits are never critical hits.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Blastoise’s third auto attack is empowered - dealing 3 instances of damage, slowing enemies hit and reducing Blastoise’s move cooldowns by 1 second each.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: Attacks with a shot of water, shoving enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Skull Bash
moves.description: Fiercely rams an opposing Pokémon and leaves it unable to act.

moves.name: Hydro Typhoon
moves.description: Has the user spout water to attack while spinning, throwing enemies in a large area. This also grants the user a shield.

passiveAbility.name: Torrent
passiveAbility.description: When the Pokémon is at half HP or less, its Attack and Sp. Attack are increased.

builds.name: Pump Spin (CDR Emblems)
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Surf Pump
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack after a set amount of time passes, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Pound
moves.description: Has the user attack by pounding in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Continually restores the user's and designated ally HP for a short time.

moves.name: Bliss Assistance
moves.description: Has the user dash to the designated ally to give it an egg, granting that ally a shield and increasing its Attack and Sp. Attack for a short time. The user also intercepts a portion of the damage received by that ally for a short time. While dashing, the user throws nearby enemies and those it comes in contact with.

passiveAbility.name: Natural Cure
passiveAbility.description: Removes all status condition from the Pokémon. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack - Charcadet
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.description: Attack with a bursting flame. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Encircles enemies in the area of effect in a vortex of fire. After this move hits, it deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Seismic Slam
moves.description: Fly up into the air, allowing the user to move freely over obstacles. While this move is being used, basic attacks deal increased damage and leave enemies burned. In addition, when dealing damage to an enemy, recover HP. Using this move again on an enemy will grab it and slam it onto the ground.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: While at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.description: Attack with a bursting flame. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Encircles enemies in the area of effect in a vortex of fire. After this move hits, it deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Shoot out a small flame, dealing damage to enemies, leaving them burned and decreasing their Attack for a short time.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.description: Make a swift low sweep in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemy it hits.

moves.name: Blazing Bicycle Kick
moves.description: Create a giant ball of flame and kick it toward the designated location. The ball releases a fierce shock wave that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. Also increases movement speed by 10% (stacks with the Unite Buffs) for 5s when it hits.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When using a move, the next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. When hitting an enemy with a basic attack or move, a cinder is placed on that enemy. Attacking a cindered enemy a certain number of times will cause the cinder to flare, dealing damage to the enemy. When at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased by 10% and basic attack speed is increased by 20% for a short time.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Has the user immediately restore HP to itself and nearby allies.

moves.name: Disarming Voice
moves.description: Has the user let out a charming cry, dealing damage to nearby enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Magic Guard
passiveAbility.description: This Pokémon receives a shield when restoring an ally Pokémon's HP. The strength of this shield is proportional to the amount of HP restored.

builds.name: Moonlight+Any
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Kiss Me
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every fourth attack. This boosted attack spits Arrokuda or other Pokémon at the enemy and deals area damage near the target when it hits.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Creates a whirlpool that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. The area of effect slowly shrinks, but the damage dealt slowly increases. Just before the whirlpool disappears, it decreases the movement speed of enemies in the area of effect for a short time. The user can also catch Arrokuda or other prey by entering the whirlpool.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.description: Decreases the Attack and movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Gatling Gulp Missile
moves.description: Creates a puddle at the user's current location. The user continuously uses its mouth to grab Arrokuda from the puddle and spits them out to attack the nearest enemy. The user cannot move or use other moves while this move is in effect.

passiveAbility.name: Gulp Missile
passiveAbility.description: When Cramorant uses a move, it catches some form of prey in its mouth. Afterward, when Cramorant receives damage, it spits the prey out as a counterattack at an enemy. The type of prey and effect differ based on the user's HP.

builds.name: Dive Slash
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Diveicane
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Surficane
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.description: Drops large rocks on the designated area. When this move hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaves them unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.description: Slashes enemies with claws, dealing damage to them. Hitting the same enemy multiple times in succession with this move increases the damage dealt.

moves.name: Rubble Rouser
moves.description: Gain a shield for a short time and leave nearby enemies unable to act, dealing damage over time to them. If the user receives damage while this move is in effect, the move deals additional hits to nearby enemies.

passiveAbility.name: Sturdy
passiveAbility.description: Gains a stacking Def/SpDef buff for every 7% HP missing. Stacks up to 10 times.

builds.name: Dark Plot (Opportunity Burst)
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Dark Plot (CDR)
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Dark Dark
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Shadow Pulse
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Increases the speed of basic attacks by 3% for a short time after one hits. This effect can stack up to 4 times, and with every third activation of this effect, basic attacks become boosted attacks for a short time. These boosted attacks fire more quills, but the damage dealt by each quill is decreased.

moves.name: Leafage
moves.description: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Nock Nock
moves.description: Fires quills in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. The move ends by unleashing a particularly large quill that deals damage to all enemies it hits. This move deals increased damage if the enemies remaining HP is low. While using this move, Decidueye becomes immune to hindrances but is unable to move.

passiveAbility.name: Long Reach
passiveAbility.description: Deals increased damage to distant enemies.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Shoot a small flame in front of itself, dealing damage to enemies hit.

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Conjure up three sinister flames and launch them toward the designated area. These flames then explode; dealing damage to enemies hit by the explosion and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Fanciful Fireworks
moves.description: Deals damage-over-time to enemies in the designated area-of-effect. Enemies that are hit have decreased movement speed and weakened HP recovery effects for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When using a move while at low remaining HP, deal additional damage with a fireball to enemies. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing consecutive blows with each of the user's heads. When the sprint gauage is full, basic attacks will cause the Pokémon to charge in the direction they're facing and consume all of the sprint gauge. If this charging attack hits an enemy, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.

moves.name: Peck
moves.description: Move forward while jabbing with beaks. When the sprint gauge is full, instead charge forward while jabbing with beaks. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Dash forward, increasing the user's movement speed for a short time and deal damage to enemies hit. This move's cooldown is reduced if it hits an enemy.

moves.name: Triple Trample
moves.description: Dodrio runs to a designated location. While running, Dodrio is immune to hindrances. If Dodrio makes contact with an enemy while running, they are dealt damage and thrown into the air. When Dodrio arrives at the designated location, Dodrio gains increased Attack for a short time, is granted a shield, and the sprint gauge charges faster for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Movement speed is increased when enemies are nearby. While the Pokémon is moving, their sprint gauge charges. While the sprint gauge is full, movement speed is increased. If the Pokémon's movement speed decreases below a set speed, the sprint gauge will rapidly deplete. When this Pokémon scores a goal, the amount of Aeos energy deposited is evenly divided into equal portions for each head the Pokémon has.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Each time damage is dealt to enemies, boosted basic attack gauge increases. When the boosted basic attack gauge is full (after 8 instances of damage), the Pokémon's basic attacks become boosted attacks.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Lets out a sound blast in a forward direction. The shout explodes when it hits an enemy or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage in the area and decreasing their movement speed for a short time

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, increasing its basic attack speed for a short time

moves.name: Dreep and Destroy
moves.description: Launches two Dreepy and each deals damage to different Pokémon in the area of effect. The lower the opposing Pokémon's remaining HP is, the more damage the Dreepy deal. If there is only one target in the area of effect, both Dreepy target that Pokémon and deal damage to it. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move. Dreepy may be fired once every 2 seconds. Neither Cooldown Reduction nor gaining Aeos Energy reduce the cooldown of Dreep and Destroy.

passiveAbility.name: Clear Body
passiveAbility.description: Reduces the duration of debuff effects inflicted on Dragapult by 50%

moves.name: Attack - Dratini
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, blasting water in front of Dratini, dealing increased damage, reducing the cooldown of Dratini's moves by 1s, and recover 5% max HP when this hits.

moves.name: Twister
moves.description: Creates a twister and releases it in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.description: Exhale a mighty gust in the designated direction. If this move hits an enemy, the user's next attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Draco Impact
moves.description: Briefly fly up in the air before crashing down with several comets on a designated area, dealing damage and throwing enemies in the area. The farther Dragonite flies, the more the Unite guage is consumed (25% at min disatance and 100% at max). Dragonite is unstoppable while using this move.

passiveAbility.name: Marvel Scale
passiveAbility.description: Increases Defense by 100 for 1.5s when afflicted by a status condition (Dratini and Dragonair only).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, shooting a long beam that deals a large amount of damage to all enemies hit.

moves.name: Laser Focus
moves.description: Reduces damage received for a short time. Afterward, Duraludon's basic attacks deal additional damage to enemies hit. This buff expires after 8s or after 3 basic attacks.

moves.name: Metal Claw
moves.description: Strike with sharp claws; dealing damage to enemies hit and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. After this move is used, Duraludon's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Revolving Ruin
moves.description: Fire a beam of light at the ground in a sweeping circle around Duraludon. If this beam hits an enemy, it deals damage to them, grants Duraludon a shield and increases their Attack by 8% for a short time. Both the shield effect and the Attack increase are strengthened for each enemy that is hit by the beam. Damage is dealt to any enemy in the area of effect after the beam of light is fired. A burning ring is also left where the beam of light touched the ground, and enemies that touch this ring take additional damage and have their movement speed decreased by 50% for 1s refreshing as damage continus to be taken from the burning ground.

passiveAbility.name: Heavy Metal
passiveAbility.description: Prevents Duraludon from being thrown or shoved by the first attempt to shove or throw them. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered (50s cd).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, attaching a bit of cotton fluff to the enemy. The user's basic attacks against an enemy with cotton fluff on it deal increased damage and decreases the enemies movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Leafage
moves.description: Pelt the target with leaves, decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.description: Restores the HP of the user and nearby allies.

moves.name: Cotton Cloud Crash
moves.description: Float into the air and become invincible. If used again, pound the ground, attacking and shoving enemies and restoring HP to allies in the area of effect.

passiveAbility.name: Cotton Down
passiveAbility.description: Damages an enemy and decreases its movement speed for a short time after receiving a certain amount of damage. When that happens, also recover HP and gain increased movement speed for a short time.

builds.name: Pollen Guard
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Aqua Cannon (Heal Cycle)
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack - Eevee
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

passiveAbility.name: Anticipation
passiveAbility.description: When Eevee would be affected by a hindrance, the hindrance is negated and Eevee becomes immune to hindrances for a short time (35s cd). Note: Hindrances include slows; multi-layered hindrance moves such as Pikachu's Volt Tackle will only have the very first launch negated.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every fifth attack, dealing increased damage and restoring the user's HP. Every time a basic attack or move hits an enemy, basic attack speed is increased.

moves.name: Sand Attack
moves.description: Hurls sand, narrowing the field of vision of enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time. Also increases movement speed and basic attack speed.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.description: Stomp down on the ground, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

moves.name: Livid Outrage
moves.description: Has the user unleash a powerful chain attack while dashing forward. The final attack throws enemies but also leaves the user unable to act for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Rough Skin
passiveAbility.description: When struck by a melee attack, a portion of the damage received is reflected back at the attacker.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their Sp. Defense by 10% for a short time.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: Attacks straight in the designated direction.

moves.name: Teleport
moves.description: Has the user warp to the designated area, increasing the damage dealt by one basic attack after warping.

moves.name: Fairy Singularity
moves.description: Warps Space in the designated area, drawing in enemies to the center. Shoves and deals damage to enemies the instant the warped space disappears.

passiveAbility.name: Synchronize
passiveAbility.description: When an enemy inflicts decreased movement speed or a damge-over-time condition on the Pokémon, the same is inflicted on that opponent. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, lunging at an enemy and dealing damage.

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Shoot multiple sinister flames, dealing damage to enemies and leaving them burned when it hits.

moves.name: Lick
moves.description: Attacks with the user's tongue and pulls enemies toward the user.

moves.name: Phantom Ambush
moves.description: Jump to the designated area and start sneaking with increased movement speed. If this move is used again, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Levitate
passiveAbility.description: Increases movement speed by 10% when out of combat. (5s after leaving combat)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and giving Glaceon 2 ice crystals when the boosted attack hits. Ice crystals last 5s and the duration is refreshed upon gaining additional crystals. Glaceon can hold a maximum of 8 ice crystals at a time.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Creates 4 stars around the user. For a short time afterward, each time the user hits an enemy with a basic attack, one of the stars (or 2 stars in the case of a boosted attack) will shoot out and deal additional damage to that enemy.

moves.name: Tail Whip
moves.description: The user wags their tail at an enemy, dealing damage and decreasing their Defense, Sp. Def, and movement speed for a short time. The user's next basic attack after using this move becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Glacial Stage
moves.description: Leap up high, creating an ice zone in front of Glaceon that deals damage to enemies in the area-of-effect. While Glaceon is in the ice zone, movement speed is increased and Glaceon gains 1 ice crystal whenever a set amount of time passes. The movement speed of enemies in the ice zone is decreased.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: When Eevee would be affected by a hindrance, the hindrance is negated and becomes invincible for 1s. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered (70s cd).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits and causing one berry to drop from Greedent's tail.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Leap to the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. If this move is used while Covet is active, no area can be designated for the user to leap to. Instead, while the user is running, damage is dealt in an area to enemies in front of Greedent. If Greedent has any berries stashed, consume all of them, reducing Tackle's cooldown for each berry consumed.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.description: Grants Greedent a shield for a short time. In addition, a berry will drop in front of Greedent.

moves.name: Berry Belly Flop
moves.description: Greedent eats a berry to recover HP and then leaps to the designated area, dealing damage and throwing enemies within the area of effect. Greedent then eats a special berry, allowing an unlimited amount of berries to be stored for a short time and resets cooldowns of all moves.

passiveAbility.name: Cheek Pouch
passiveAbility.description: When Greedent eats a berry, recover HP after receiving the effects of the berry. At the same time, Greedent stashes another berry in its tail. Being hit by a single attack or combination of attacks will cause a berry to drop from Greedent's tail.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. At long range, a boosted attack deals increased damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time. At close range, a boosted attack deals more damage the lower the enemies remaining HP is.

moves.name: Bubble
moves.description: Attack with a spray of bubbles, decreasing the movement speed of enemies when it hits.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.description: Leaves behind a substitute doll for the user while it's moving forward.

moves.name: Waterburst Shuriken
moves.description: Throw a giant water shuriken toward the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when this move hits. The water shuriken then immediately explodes, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throws them. Once this move ends, the user may jump in a designated direction.

passiveAbility.name: Torrent
passiveAbility.description: While HP is at 50% or less, Attack and movement speed are increased.

passiveAbility.name: Rattled
passiveAbility.description: When damaged, increases movement speed by 5% for 3s (up to 5 times; maximum 25%).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies by unleashing a beam of light. When Hoopa is unbound, every attack becomes a boosted attack and deals damage to up to 2 additional nearby enemies.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies in the designated area of effect, leaving them unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: Unleash a telekinetic force in the designated direction, dealing damage to the first enemy hit. The telekinetic force clings to that enemy and then causes a delayed explosion. The explosion deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Rings Unbound
moves.description: Transforms Hoopa into Hoopa Unbound for a short time, increasing max HP and creating a ring at the designated location. Each ally can warp to the ring's location one time. As Hoopa Unbound, moves change to Hyperspace Fury and Psybeam. Hoopa Unbound cannot score goals or activate the Magician ability.

passiveAbility.name: Magician
passiveAbility.description: In battles where the map is divided into an ally team side and an opposing team side, this ability creates a hole under one of the berries on the opposing team's side (chosen at random) and warps it in front of Hoopa. If there are no berries, but there is Aeos Energy on the ground, then some energy is warped in front of Hoopa instead. In the event that no berries from the opposing team's side are warped, the cooldown of this ability is reduced.

builds.name: Phantom Trick
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Mobility for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage with an increased critical-hit rate.

moves.name: Tearful Look
moves.description: Decreases the Attack and Sp. Atk of the target Pokémon by 20% for 3s. Inteleon gains a critical counter and increases its movement speed.

passiveAbility.name: Sniper
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon stays near a wall for 1s it becomes camouflaged, making opposing Pokémon unable to target it, and starts gaining critical counters (up to a maximum of 3). A critical counter is gained as soon as Inteleon is camouflaged, with a new counter gained every 3s while camouflaged. Hitting any Pokémon prevents Inteleon from becoming camouflaged for 3s. When a critical counter is consumed, Inteleon's next attack or move that can critically strike is guaranteed to be a critical hit.

moves.name: Attack - Eevee
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing additional damage.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Eevee has 10% increased movement speed when out of combat. (5s after leaving combat)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, performing a combo attack with a bone. Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and throws them.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Has the user lunge forward at a speed that makes it almost invisible, dealing damage to enemies it comes in contact with.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.description: Blast forward with a punch like a comet, dealing damage to enemies and shoving them.

moves.name: Aura Cannon
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. Increases the damage dealt by the user's next Power-Up Punch after using this move.

passiveAbility.name: Steadfast
passiveAbility.description: While at low HP, gain a shield and increased movement speed. (30s cooldown)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits. This boosted attack also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Karate Chop
moves.description: Attack opposing Pokémon with a sharp chop.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.description: Become immune to hindrances for a short time. Increases movement speed, basic attack speed, and Attack. The next basic attack also becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Barrage Blow
moves.description: Increases Machamp's movement speed by 5%, Attack by 30%, Defense by 200, and Sp. Defense by 200 for 10s. If used again, unleash a combo attack, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and shoving them. The final blow deals double the damage of the previous hits.

passiveAbility.name: Guts
passiveAbility.description: Increases Attack when afflicted by a status condition.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage and freezing enemies for a short time when it hits. Mamoswine's basic attacks deal increased damage for a short time to enemies recently frozen with one of Mamoswine's moves.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Hurls 3 chunks of ice at the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If an enemy is hit by all three chunks, they're left frozen for a short time.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Mamoswine rushes recklessly in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies they hit and throws them in the air.

moves.name: Mammoth Mash
moves.description: Mamoswine jumps to the designated location and becomes immune to hindrances - then repeatedly stomps the ground, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time with each stomp. The final stomp throws enemies in the air.

passiveAbility.name: Thick Fat
passiveAbility.description: When Mamoswine deals damage, Defense and Sp. Def are increased for 3s, stacking up to 3 times. When Mamoswine uses Ice Shard, Icicle Crash or Ice Fang, the next basic attack is boosted. If any of these moves creates a freezing area of effect inside an ally goal zone, the goal-scoring speed of enemies is decreased.

passiveAbility.name: Synchronize
passiveAbility.description: Each time Mew uses a move, Mew and nearby allies have their movement speed increased by 15% for 2s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: When Mewtwo Mega Evolves, deal increased damage and becomes a boosted attack with every third attack.

passiveAbility.name: Pressure
passiveAbility.description: When Mewtwo deals damage to an opposing Pokémon with a basic attack, the Mega gauge increases. Each time the Mega gauge increases, Mewtwo attack is increased by 2% and its Defense and Sp. Def are increased by 2%, up to 10 times. If Mewtwo is Lv. 5 or higher, and the Mega gauge has stacked at least 9 times, it Mega Evolves. The Mega Evolution lasts 15s and increases Mewtwo attack by an additional 10%, Defense and Sp. Def by an additional 10%, its max HP by 10% and its movement speed by 5%.

moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and throwing enemies when it hits.

moves.name: Fake Out

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.description: Create a wall of light in the designated area that prevents enemies from passing.

moves.name: Showtime
moves.description: Jump to the designated location and start a pantomime performance, dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Filter
passiveAbility.description: Reduced damage received for a short time after using a move.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to nearby enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Powder Snow
moves.description: Attack with a chilly gust of powdery snow, decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: Attack with a gust of freezing air, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Snow Globe
moves.description: Attacks with a chilly blast of snow and ice, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect when it hits. Deals increased damage to enemies that are frozen.

passiveAbility.name: Snow Warning
passiveAbility.description: Causes snow to fall on an enemy, dealing damage to it and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for .75s. Boosted attacks, Snow Warning, and all moves (except Aurora Veil) sling snow; hitting the same target with snow 4 times will freeze them for 1s. This ability has an 8s cooldown.

moves.name: Electroweb

moves.name: Thunderstorm
moves.description: Attacks enemies near the user with tremendous bolts of lightning.

passiveAbility.name: Static

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If Sableye is in stealth when it hits an opposing Pokémon with a boosted attack, it will deal damage and apply a fear effect. Opposing Pokémon affected by fear will be forced to move away from Sableye. When the user enters stealth, it will charge boosted attack immediately and hold it.

moves.name: Thief
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to any Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this move hits an enemy Pokémon, it steals a small amount of their Aeos energy. If those Pokémon do not have any Aeos energy, they will be left unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Attacks in a cone in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this move hits opposing Pokémon from behind, it deals increased damage and applies a greater decrease in movement speed.

moves.name: Chaos Glower
moves.description: Shoot light from both eyes, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in an cone in front of itself. Pokémon from the opposing team hit by this move who are facing the user are left unable to act and start preparing to return to base. If they take damage before returning to base, the return effect is cancelled, and they are left unable to act for a short time. Opposing Pokémon hit by this move who are not facing the user have their movement speed decreased for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Prankster
passiveAbility.description: When Sableye is outside the visual range of Pokémon from the opposing team, it enters stealth and its movement speed increases. When Sableye enters the visual range of a Pokémon from the opposing team, it does not immediately become visible but instead remains in stealth for a short time. This stealth lasts longer when approaching enemy Pokémon from behind. The Pokémon with this Ability exits stealth when it attacks.

passiveAbility.name: Technician
passiveAbility.description: After using a move, the next basic attack will change to deal 2 attacks instead. The second attack deals reduced damage.

passiveAbility.name: Technician
passiveAbility.description: After using a move, the next basic attack will change to deal 2 attacks instead. The second attack deals reduced damage.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, deal damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and decrease their movement speed.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: Slowbro channels a fierce stream of water which deals damage and lowers movement speed. Increase the area of effect and damage the longer this move is channeled.

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.description: Lay down and take a rest, continuously regaining health. Damage taken will reduce the recovery effect.

moves.name: Slowbeam
moves.description: Stare at an enemy and attack continually, dealing damage and rooting them. Grants a shield and makes the user immune to hindrances while using this move.

passiveAbility.name: Oblivious
passiveAbility.description: When Slowbro receives damage, the HP loss is gradual. When damaging an opponent with a move, restore some of the remaining gradual HP loss and decrease the target's Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to nearby enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Charge forward belly first, dealing damage when it hits and shoving the first enemy it comes in contact with. After this move, the user's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Rest
moves.description: Has the user fall asleep on the spot and restores its HP. Blocks the movement of all enemies while this move is in effect.

moves.name: Power Nap
moves.description: Go to sleep and begin snoring, dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and throw them. While sleeping, become immune to hindrances and continually restore HP.

passiveAbility.name: Gluttony
passiveAbility.description: Increases the effects gained from eating Berries.

moves.name: Attack - Eevee
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Shoots star-shaped rays at enemies, dealing damage to them.

moves.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
moves.description: Stare at an enemy with baby-doll eyes, dealing damage and decreasing their Attack and movement speed for a short time when this move hits.

moves.name: Fairy Frolic
moves.description: Jump into the air and become briefly invincible. The moment Sylveon lands, deal damage to enemies in the area of effect and restore Sylveon's HP. For 10s afterward, 50% of damage dealt by Sylveon is converted into HP (basic attacks are excluded).

passiveAbility.name: Adaptability
passiveAbility.description: Every time Eevee deals or receives damage, increase Sp. Attack by 5% for 1.5s, stacking up to 4 times.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, creating a fiery whirlwind that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. This boosted attack remains readied even after leaving combat for a prolonged period of time.

moves.name: Peck
moves.description: Fly toward an enemy and attack 3 times.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.description: Fly toward the designated area and attack multiple times. Escape in a direction of your choice after using this move.

moves.name: Flame Sweep
moves.description: Perform an aerial somersault before charging forawrd, dealing damage to enemies in this move's path and shoving them.

passiveAbility.name: Gale Wings
passiveAbility.description: While at high HP, movement speed is increased.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, lunging at an opposing Pokémon, damage nearby opposing Pokémon and lowering the Defense of those hit by 20% for 1s.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The critical-hit rate of this move is higher than that of basic attacks.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.description: Tsareena spins in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemy hit. When this move hits, increase Tsareena's movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Queen Ascendant
moves.description: Tsareena leaps toward an enemy from the opposing team and kicks it high into the air before showering it with a series of kicks while airborne, dealing damage to them. The moment Tsareena lands on the ground, recover HP. While airborne, the enemy that is being kicked and Tsareena are not affected by other moves.

passiveAbility.name: Oblivious
passiveAbility.description: When a hindrance is inflicted on Bounsweet, Steenee; decrease the duration of the effect.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.

passiveAbility.name: Guts
passiveAbility.description: When Larvitar receives damage equal to at least 10% of max HP, Attack is increased by 30% for 3s. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered (40s cd).

passiveAbility.name: Anticipation
passiveAbility.description: When Eevee would be shoved, thrown or left unabled to act, that effect is negated. This effect goes on a 40s cooldown after being triggered and is reset after respawning.

moves.name: Attack - Kubfu
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with increased range every third attack, lunging at an opposing Pokémon and dealing increased damage.

passiveAbility.name: Inner Focus
passiveAbility.description: Reduces the duration of hindrances inflicted on Kubfu by 15%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Restores the Pokémon's HP and nullifies damage from Pokémon from the opposing team. This Ability goes on a 30s cooldown after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage. This boosted attack also pulls enemies inward between the vines.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.description: Hurl a large seed at the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description: Launch many sharp-edged leaves in a quick succession of attacks, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

moves.name: Verdant Anger
moves.description: Launches a giant seed toward the designated area. The seed then splits apart, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Overgrow
passiveAbility.description: When HP is low, increases all damage dealt.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and spinning them around when it hits.

moves.name: Pound
moves.description: Perform a combo attack in front, dealing damage to enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when the attack hits.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.description: Perform a quick roll, granting the user a shield and throwing any enemies hit by the roll. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction the user is moving and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, or Dazzling Gleam.

moves.name: Starlight Recital
moves.description: Begin performing a recital, granting the user and nearby allies a shield as well as removing all status conditions from the affected allies and make them immune to hindrances for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Cute Charm
passiveAbility.description: When hit by an enemies attack at close range, make that enemy infatuated for a short time. Infatuated enemies become enthralled and approach Wigglytuff against their will. The effects of this ability have a cooldown and cannot trigger on the same enemy in quick succession.

builds.name: Bolt Cannon
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing the enemy while restoring some of Zeraora's HP.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Perform a quick dash and increase basic attack speed for a short time afterward.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Pounce at an enemy and attack with sharp claws. This move's final attack throws enemies.

moves.name: Plasma Gale
moves.description: Unleash a blast of lightning, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throw them. This also creates a zone of plasma that increases the user's basic attack range and damage dealt while inside this zone.

passiveAbility.name: Volt Absorb
passiveAbility.description: Gain an electric charge when receiving damage, converting a portion of that damage into additional Attack.

builds.name: Discharge Switch
builds.emblemName: Charging Charm (Less Critical Rate, Slight higher bulk)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit.

moves.name: Fury Swipes
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time afterwards, this move can be activated again.

moves.name: Nightfall Daze
moves.description: Release dark shockwaves, dealing damage to enemies hit. Three shockwaves are released, and each one has an increasingly larger area-of-effect. Zoroark is immune to hindrances while releasing shockwaves.

passiveAbility.name: Illusion
passiveAbility.description: The user takes the form of a random wild Pokémon or Pokémon from the opposing team. The user returns to their original form when taking damage or using an auto attack or move (15s cd).

heldItems.description: Upon making an assist, or knocking out a Pokémon from the opposing team: increases Attack by 0.3/0.45/0.6% until the end of battle (up to 20 stacks; maximum 6/9/12%). Assists add 1 stack; KOs add 2 stacks.
Upon scoring a goal: increases max HP by 100/150/200 until the end of battle (up to 6 times; maximum 600/900/1200 bonus max HP).
Gain 60/80/100% more Aeos Energy for defeating wild Pokémon (16s cd). Goal-scoring speed is passively increased by 10%.

When not receiving special damage for 15s: grants a 10/15/20% max HP shield effect that nullifies Sp. Attack-based damage until it is destroyed. This shield can be refreshed even if its not fully depleted.
Upon scoring a goal: increases Attack by 6/9/12 until the end of battle (up to 6 times; maximum 36/54/72 bonus Attack).
Improves HP recovery by 10/15/20% from self healing.

When using their Unite Move: grants the holder and 1 nearby ally with the lowest current HP a shield equal to 15/20/25% of the holder's max HP for 5s (30s CD). Additional Buddy Barrier shields do not stack, but instead refresh the duration of the remaining shield effect.

Charges energy through movement (+1 per distance unit traveled) and auto attacks (+9 per auto attack damage instance dealt), up to 100 energy. When energy is full: damaging an opposing Pokémon deals 20/30/40 + 50/60/70% Attack as additional damage to the first target hit, consuming the charged energy.
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mega Charizard X hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mega Charizard Y hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

Dealing auto attack damage to a Pokémon from the opposing team adds 1 stack of a hidden buff for 2s, up to 3 stacks. Taking non movement, non auto attack actions will reset the stack count to 0. After the 3rd stack: increases movement speed by 30/35/40% for 3s (8s CD).
When damaging an opposing Pokémon with a move: deals 40/50/60 + 30/35/40% Sp. Attack as additional damage to the first target hit (8s CD).
Attack-based damage dealt to opposing Pokémon weakens their HP recovery effect by 20/25/30% for 1.5 seconds.
Sp. Attack-based damage dealt to opposing Pokémon weakens their HP recovery effect by 20/25/30% for 1.5 seconds.
Attack-based auto attacks restore HP equal to 9%/12%/15% of damage dealt directly to an opposing Pokémon's HP.

Upon making an assist, or knocking out a Pokémon from the opposing team: increases Sp. Attack by 0.3/0.45/0.6% until the end of battle (up to 20 stacks; maximum 6/9/12%). Assists add 1 stack; KOs add 2 stacks.
When using their Unite Move: increases damage dealt by 7/14/21% for 4s (15s CD). Note: certain Unite Moves have unique interactions with this held item.
While having the fewest Exp. Points on the team: gains an additional 3/4/5 Exp. Points every 1s.
When not in combat for 5s: increases movement speed by 10/15/20%.
When below 25% HP: recovers 6/9/12% missing HP 3 times over 3s, once every 1s (100/90/80s CD).
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Gyarados hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
When not in combat for 5s: recovers 2/3/4% max HP every 1s.
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Lucario hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mewtwo hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mewtwo hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
Auto attacks deal 1/2/3% of opposing Pokémon's remaining HP as additional Attack-based damage (against Pokémon from the opposing team: additional damage is capped at 120/240/360).
Dealing auto attack damage to an opposing Pokémon adds 1 stack of a hidden buff for 3s, up to 3 stacks. After the 3rd stack: increases auto attack speed by 15/20/25% for 5s (10s CD).

For 3s after using a move: the next auto attack to damage an opposing Pokémon deals 10/15/20 + 40/45/50% Attack as additional damage to the first target hit; if held by a Melee Pokémon: also decreases the movement speed of the target by 30% for 1s (1.5s CD).
Increases HP recovery and shield effects granted to ally Pokémon by 11/14/17%.

When damaging a Pokémon from the opposing team: grants the holder and 1 nearby ally with the lowest current HP a shield for 60/80/100 + 4%/5%/6% of the holder's max HP for 3s (10s CD). Additional Resonant Guard shields do not stack, but instead refresh the duration of the remaining shield effect.
Upon receiving damage equal to 3% max HP or more from an opposing Pokémon in a single hit: deals 1.2/1.5/1.8% of the holder's max HP as Attack-based damage to nearby opposing Pokémon (0.6s CD).
It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.
Upon dealing a critical hit with an auto attack: deals an additional hit of damage equal to 45/60/75% Attack to 1 target (1s CD).

While attempting to score a goal: grants a score shield that prevents scoring from being interrupted until it is destroyed or the goal is scored (20s CD). This shield will be destroyed before other shields. Shield value uses the holder's HP and current level: 15/22/30 + 5/7.5/10% max HP + 15/22/30 × (Lv. - 1).
When hitting an opposing Pokémon with a move: recovers HP equal to 50/65/80 + 40/50/60% Sp. Attack (8s CD).
Sp. Attack-based damage dealt ignores 9/12/15% of opposing Pokémon's Sp. Def.
Upon scoring a goal: increases Sp. Attack by 8/12/16 until the end of battle (up to 6 times; maximum 48/72/96 bonus Sp. Attack).
When a hindrance is inflicted on the Pokémon, the Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def are increased by 12/20/28% for 3 seconds.
When a hindrance is inflicted on a Pokémon from the opposing team, the holder's HP is restored by 6/8/10% max HP (5s CD).
Upon receiving damage: increases Attack by 1.5/2/2.5% for 3s (up to 4 times; maximum 6/8/10%).
Further increases Sp. Atk by 3/5/7%.

battleItems.description: Applies a debuff to the designated wild Pokémon for 3s; disabling the target's attacks. When damaging the debuffed target: deals 100 + 100% Atk + 60% SpAtk + 10 × (Lv. - 1) as additional damage (0.5s CD).
Cleanses status conditions, and becomes unstoppable for 1.5s.

Tampers with 1 goal zone in range for 4s. If used on an ally goal zone: doubles any shield provided by the goal zone, and strengthens the goal zone's HP restoration rate (restoring HP every 0.5s) for the duration of the effect. If used on an opposing goal zone: disables shield effects and HP restoration from that goal zone for the duration of the effect. Additional applications on an affected goal zone overrides the previous effects and refreshes the duration.
Restores HP equal to 160 + 20% max HP.
Creates a cloud of smoke in an area of effect around the user for 3.5s; decreasing the movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect by 80%, and their basic attack speed by 50%.
Increases Attack and Sp. Attack by 20%, and basic attack speed by 25% for 6.5s.
Increases movement speed by 45%, and prevents movement speed from being decreased for 6s.
Makes the user impervious to damage, immune to status conditions, and unable to act for 2s.
